title: linaria striata
intro: Linaria striata, also known as the striated toadflax or narrow-leaved toadflax, is a flowering plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Linaria striata are said to include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
